untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identifying and measuring a horizontal consolidation pattern with explicit support/resistance levels and calculating a dynamic profit target based on consolidation height. This requires pattern recognition logic (support_level, resistance_level, consolidation_height) that cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators. While dc_upper/dc_lower can approximate breakout detection, the precise measurement of consolidation area height and the dynamic profit target calculation (resistance_level + (resistance_level - support_level)) requires custom pattern detection unavailable in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation: dc_upper could represent resistance in a ranging market, and close crossing above it could signal breakout. However, this loses the core requirement of measuring the consolidation pattern's height and setting profit target at resistance + consolidation_height. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection inputs or pre-calculated support/resistance levels as external parameters.
